channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NARMP] Sachin Modi Acquires 3.62% Stake in Narmada Macplast Drip Irrigation Systems Ltd via Open Market
item.description:
Sachin Modi has acquired 3.62% stake in Narmada Macplast Drip Irrigation Systems Ltd through open market transactions. The total shares acquired by Modi amount to 1313892, which is equivalent to 3.62% of the total share and voting capital of the company. Additionally, Modi has encumbered 400061 shares, which is 1.10% of the total share and voting capital. The total diluted share and voting capital of the company after the acquisition stands at 913831, which is 2.52% of the total.

  • Sachin Modi acquires 3.62% stake in Narmada Macplast Drip Irrigation Systems Ltd
  • Acquisition made through open market transactions
  • Total shares acquired: 1313892
  • Total shares encumbered: 400061
  • Total diluted share and voting capital post-acquisition: 913831 (2.52% of total)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NARMADA MACPLAST DRIP IRRIGATION SYSTEMS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [TCFCFINQ] TCFC Finance Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window Until After Q4 Results
item.description:
TCFC Finance Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window, which will remain closed from 1st April, 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March, 2026. The date of the board meeting to approve the audited financial results has not been specified yet. Insiders and designated persons are advised not to trade in the securities of the company during this period.

  • Trading window of TCFC Finance Ltd to close from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure is in accordance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Window to remain closed until 48 hours after Q4 and FY2026 results
  • Board meeting date for approval of results not yet announced
  • Insiders and designated persons advised not to trade during closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TCFC FINANCE LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AMTL] Advance Metering Technology Ltd: Share Price Movement Due to Market Conditions, No Material Information Withheld
item.description:
Advance Metering Technology Ltd has clarified that the movement in its share price is solely due to market conditions and is absolutely market driven. The company has made necessary disclosures as per regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has not withheld any material information or event that could impact the scrip's price behavior. They will continue to make timely applications disclosures.

  • Share price movement of Advance Metering Technology Ltd is due to market conditions
  • Company has made necessary disclosures as per SEBI regulations
  • No material information or events withheld that could impact scrip's price behavior
  • Advance Metering Technology Ltd to continue timely application disclosures

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADVANCE METERING TECHNOLOGY LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [TANAA] Trading Window Closure Notice for Taneja Aerospace & Aviation Ltd's Audited Results for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Taneja Aerospace & Aviation Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for designated persons, their immediate relatives, and other insiders. The closure is effective from April 01, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the year ending March 31, 2026, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. All designated persons and insiders are advised to take note and comply with the notice.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and insiders of Taneja Aerospace & Aviation Ltd.
  • Closure effective from April 01, 2026.
  • Closure to last until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for FY 2025-2026.
  • Compliance notice as per SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TANEJA AEROSPACE & AVIATION LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CSURGSU] Trading Window Closed for Centenial Surgical Suture Ltd until 48 hours after Q4 & Year Ended Results Dissemination in 2026
item.description:
Centenial Surgical Suture Ltd has announced that the trading window for dealing in the company’s securities will be closed from Wednesday, April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the financial results of the company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 have been disseminated to the stock exchange. This announcement is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for prevention of Insider Trading under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and BSE circular LIST / COMP / 01 / 2019-20 dated 02nd April, 2019.

  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after Q4 & year ended results dissemination.
  • Announcement in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for prevention of Insider Trading under SEBI regulations.
  • Closure to affect all designated persons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTENIAL SURGICAL SUTURE LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [UPROTECH] Unipro Technologies Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Q4 FY2025-2026
item.description:
Unipro Technologies Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for the 4th quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. As per the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of insider trading) Regulations, 2015, the closure will commence from 01.04.2026 and end 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31.03.2026. This applies to all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and all connected persons covered under the Company’s Code of Conduct.

  • Unipro Technologies Ltd announces trading window closure for Q4 FY2025-2026.
  • Closure to commence from 01.04.2026 and end 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results.
  • Applies to all designated persons, their immediate relatives, and all connected persons under the Company’s Code of Conduct.
  • The date of the Board Meeting for the financial results declaration will be intimated separately.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Unipro Technologies Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PERMAGN] Trading Window Closure for Permanent Magnets Ltd. for Q1 2026
item.description:
Permanent Magnets Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the company's Internal Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading. The closure is effective from April 01, 2026, and will remain in force until 48 hours after the declaration of the company's Audited (Standalone and Consolidated) Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of these results is yet to be intimated.

  • Trading window closure for Q1 2026
  • In accordance with SEBI regulations and company's Internal Code of Conduct
  • Effective from April 01, 2026
  • Will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for Q1 2026
  • Date of Board Meeting for result declaration yet to be intimated

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PERMANENT MAGNETS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BFUTILITIE] BF Utilities Ltd: Trading Window Closure for Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
BF Utilities Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The closure is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading and SEBI regulations. The trading window will remain closed for Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and specified Connected Persons of the company until 48 hours after the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 become generally available.

  • BF Utilities Ltd. has closed its trading window for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.
  • The closure is in accordance with the company's Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading and SEBI regulations.
  • The trading window will remain closed for Designated Persons, their immediate relatives, and specified Connected Persons of the company.
  • The closure will last until 48 hours after the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 become generally available.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BF UTILITIES LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [EASEMYTRIP] EaseMyTrip Partners Exclusively with MSTC to Power Travel Services for Govt Sector
item.description:
🔥 Trending

EaseMyTrip, one of India’s leading online travel-tech platforms, has entered into an exclusive partnership with MSTC Ltd., a Government of India enterprise under the Ministry of Steel, to provide comprehensive, technology-enabled travel solutions. The agreement allows EaseMyTrip to integrate its APIs with MSTC’s system, enabling access to a wide range of services, including flights, hotels, holiday packages, bus bookings, activities, and cab services. Through this strategic collaboration, MSTC will facilitate Corporate Travel for Govt Sector Organisations, leveraging EaseMyTrip’s extensive travel inventory and advanced technology infrastructure.

  • EaseMyTrip enters an exclusive partnership with MSTC Ltd.
  • The partnership aims to provide comprehensive, technology-enabled travel solutions for the Govt sector.
  • EaseMyTrip to integrate its APIs with MSTC’s system, enabling access to various travel services.
  • MSTC to facilitate Corporate Travel for Govt Sector Organisations through this partnership.
  • EaseMyTrip to expand its presence within the institutional and government travel segment.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Easy Trip Planners Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [PRAJIND] Praj Industries Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Praj Industries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the company's shares by all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is pursuant to the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company's Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, 1st April, 2026, till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results for the financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting to consider the Audited Financial Results will be intimated separately.

  • Praj Industries Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Closure pursuant to SEBI regulations and company's Code of Conduct
  • Trading window to remain closed from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure till 48 hours after declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Date of Board Meeting to consider Audited Financial Results to be intimated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRAJ INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
